zh.lifeSummary: 當King Bledri Ap Cydifor於1057年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧時，他的父親Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch27歲，母親Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn28歲。他於大約1086年與Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1117年在英國威爾斯享年60歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Bledri Ap Cydifor于1057年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧时，他的父亲Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch27岁，母亲Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn28岁。他于大约1086年与Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1117年在英国威尔斯享年60岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

en.lifeSummary: When King Bledri Ap Cydifor was born in 1057, in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch, was 27 and his mother, Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn, was 28. He married Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd about 1086. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1117, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Bledri Ap Cydifor est né en 1057, à Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd environ 1086. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1117, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Bledri Ap Cydifor è nato il nel 1057 nel Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd circa 1086. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1117, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: King Bledri Ap Cydiforが1057年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランウィニオで生まれた時，父Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuchは27歳，母Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwynは28歳であった。約1086年にClydwen Ferch Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1117年にイギリスウェールズで60歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭가도그 인 키드웰이
ko.lifeSummary: King Bledri Ap Cydifor(이)가 1057년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜윈이오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1086년 Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1117년 영국 웨일스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Bledri Ap Cydifor nasceu em 1057, em Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd aproximadamente 1086. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1117, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ллангадог ин кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Bledri Ap Cydifor родился в 1057 г. в местности лланвинио, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Cydifor Fawr Ap Collwyn Lord of Blaen Cuch было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor verch Llywarch Gollwyn, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd около 1086 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1117 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd aproximadamente 1086. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1117, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
